title: The Post Office Cash Certificates Act, 1917
full_text: The Post Office Cash Certificates Act, 1917 डाकघर नकदी पत्र अधिनियम,1917 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191718 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1917-09-19 Act Year: 1917 Short Title: The Post Office Cash Certificates Act, 1917 Hindi Title: डाकघर नकदी पत्र अधिनियम,1917 Long Title: An Act to restrict the transfer of Post Office 5-Year Cash Certificates and to provide for the payment of Certificates standing in the name of deceased persons. Ministry: Ministry of Communications Department: Department of Posts Enforcement Date: 19-09-1917 Last Updated: 03-12-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Post Office Cash Certificates Act, 1917 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Prohibition of transfer of Post Office 5-year Cash Certificates without the consent of an authorised officer. Section 3. Payment on death of holder of Post Office 5-year Cash Certificate.
